overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character in a long coat and hat walking along a wooden industrial dock. The scene features sailing ships, wooden warehouses, industrial buildings with smokestacks, and dock workers, set under an overcast sky with wet wooden surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden shipping dock with crane and storage supplies

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock past shipping barrels and supplies

entered.detail: weathered blue wooden building with white-framed windows and mounted fish baskets
stacks of wooden shipping barrels and crates covered with green tarps
industrial black metal crane with operator cabin and extending boom arm
tall wooden masts of docked sailing vessels visible in the harbor distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet wooden dock, passing a blue wooden warehouse on the right and stacks of barrels on the left. A large industrial crane dominates the center view ahead, while sailing ship masts are visible in the distant harbor under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront pier with moored sailing vessels

events.description: passing the large crane and entering the open harbor view with multiple sailing ships

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dock with harbor and ships visible to the right, approaching industrial buildings

entered.detail: multiple wooden sailing vessels with distinctive red masts docked along the pier
large brick industrial buildings with multiple smokestacks emitting dark smoke
long industrial structure with green metal framework and glass panels

segments.scene_description: Having passed the crane, the view opens to the harbor with several sailing ships featuring red masts docked along the water. Industrial buildings with smoking chimneys rise in the background, while the character continues walking along the weathered wooden planks of the pier.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial lumber yard with manufacturing building

events.description: encountering dock workers carrying long wooden planks across the path

agents.ego_description: navigating through workers carrying lumber near the Madison & Co building, moving toward a covered walkway

notable_agents.action: worker carrying long wooden plank on shoulder, walking toward camera
worker in blue shirt walking ahead in same direction

entered.detail: two-story brown wooden industrial building with yellow signage reading 'M. MADISON & CO'
organized piles of wooden planks and timber stacked on the dock

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the Madison & Co manufacturing building, navigating through dock workers carrying lumber. Stacks of timber line the path, and the industrial smokestacks are now visible to the left as the character moves toward a covered section of the dock.

events.description: entering the covered walkway with reduced natural light and overhead wooden roof

agents.ego_description: walking under the wooden awning past workers sitting and resting on crates

notable_agents.action: worker sitting on wooden crate, resting against the warehouse wall

entered.detail: wooden plank roof structure providing shelter over the dock walkway
thick wooden posts supporting the overhead roof structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered section of the dock, where the lighting becomes noticeably dimmer under the wooden roof. Workers sit resting against the warehouse wall as the character continues along the sheltered wooden planks, with support beams lining the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pier with ferry terminal and passenger seating

events.description: exiting the covered walkway back into open overcast daylight

agents.ego_description: approaching the ferry terminal building at the end of the pier, passing seated figures

notable_agents.action: worker sitting on bench near the warehouse wall

entered.detail: distinctive multi-story white building with tower and observation deck at the pier end
vessel with red trim docked alongside the pier

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens to a wider pier area with a distinctive white ferry terminal building featuring a tower ahead. A red-trimmed boat is visible docked to the left, and the character continues toward the end of the pier under the overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wet industrial dock that transitions from an open harbor view into a sheltered walkway before ending at a wide pier terminal. It begins with the character walking past a blue warehouse and stacks of barrels toward a large industrial crane, while sailing ship masts loom in the distance under an overcast sky. As the camera passes the crane, the view opens to reveal sailing ships with red masts and smoking chimneys in the background before shifting toward the Madison & Co manufacturing building and dock workers carrying lumber. The scene then moves into a covered section of the dock where the lighting dims beneath a wooden roof and support beams, passing resting workers along the warehouse wall. Finally, the camera exits the shelter and opens onto a wider pier area, moving toward a white ferry terminal tower with a red-trimmed boat docked to the left.
